---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What are you trying to do that isn't possible today?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

Have you considered any other approaches? Why did you rule them out?

## Additional context

Mockups, links, or anything else that helps clarify the request.
